calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Appointment Of Provisional Director
Off Calendar Jul-11-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER EFRAIM SHOUA'S Motion For Appointment Of Provisional Director (Corporation Code 308) is DENIED without prejudice. Efraim Shoua's evidentiary showing is relatively conclusory and it fails to demonstrate a voting stalemate or that corporate property is imperiled. In addition, the court doubts that Mr. Backman is sufficiently impartial to act as the provisional director. The evidence indicates that he is aligned with Efraim Shoua, currently works for the corporation and may be a creditor of the corporation, and there is a potential conflict of interest if Mr. Backman is appointed provisional director and Mr. Backman is subsequently accused of financial mismanagement of the corporation in case #559401. Order signed. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/SRB)
